summary: Tested AuraGraph AI Study Buddy for reported bugs: note generation with proficiency levels and LaTeX rendering, plus mutation functionality. Backend APIs working excellently with all fixes implemented. Frontend navigation issue prevents full UI testing.

ui_bugs.issue: Cannot navigate from dashboard to actual notebook workspace to test mutation UI flow

integration_issues.issue: Unable to access NotebookWorkspace component to test 'Ask a Doubt' button, modal, and mutation indicators

passed_tests: POST /api/fuse with Beginner proficiency - covers ALL topics (Hypergeometric, Binomial, Poisson, Normal, CLT)
POST /api/fuse with Advanced proficiency - rigorous content with all topics
LaTeX formatting validation - all responses use $ and $$ delimiters correctly
POST /api/mutate - addresses student doubts with proper rewritten content
Mutation API provides concept gap diagnosis
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend routing from dashboard to notebook workspace. The backend APIs are working perfectly - all LaTeX formatting and topic coverage bugs are RESOLVED. Need to fix navigation to test the complete UI mutation flow including 'Ask a Doubt' button, modal, mutated badge, and doubts tab.
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (all reported bugs fixed), Frontend: 40% (navigation issues prevent full testing)
